DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIAO, ZHEN WEN AS TO DEFENDANT WAI, JOHN E. DBA  UNITED PROPERTY SERVICE
